subcodes.first_line: The Book from the Wronged One, Who is imprisoned in the fortress of 'Akká, unto him who desireth to drink from the Kawthar of life [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب من لدی المظلوم الذی سجن فی حصن عکاء الی من اراد ان یشرب کوثر الحیوان من
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @prayer for forgiveness, @apocalyptic imagery, @laws of God; of the Kitab-i-Aqdas, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @humility; meekness; lowliness
